mapper.select: SELECT id, name, cost, base_power AS basePower, attribute, image_file AS imageFile, ability_deploy_code AS abilityDeployCode, ability_passive_code AS abilityPassiveCode, deploy_help AS deployHelp, passive_help AS passiveHelp FROM card_definition ORDER BY id

SELECT id, name, cost, base_power AS basePower, attribute, image_file AS imageFile, ability_deploy_code AS abilityDeployCode, ability_passive_code AS abilityPassiveCode, deploy_help AS deployHelp, passive_help AS passiveHelp FROM card_definition WHERE id = #{id}
